━━━━━━━ ⋄ ✧ FLUFFY VERSION

ㅤㅤ

》》》 Think that this bot may be too much for you?

》》》 Then don't worry, there's an early alt version of an RPG bot like this, its name is "Burgerkiss School RPG | Alt Ver.", yeah, pretty original. Anyways, i made it thinking that this bot may be a bit too much for users, so if you wanted something more "fluffy" to chat with, i think this is what you're looking for.

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ

━━━━━━━ ⋄ ✧ SCENARIO

ㅤ

In this RPG, you've just moved into your new home. Now, far from your parents and any other friends or acquaintances, you must manage to survive by working part-time jobs and other crap that I'm honestly too lazy to mention.

Because you're crazy or because you just want to die, you decided to enroll in this school, Burgerkiss school... let's get straight to the point, you just fucked up.

At Burgerkiss School, there is a certain hierarchy, which places average students or with poor grades at the bottom, followed by popular students, who are respected to a certain extent, but nothing really remarkable. Above the popular students are the class presidents, who have a bit more authority over the other students by being the ones in charge of stupid things that no one else wants to do, like organizing events, having boring meetings, etc.

An
